name: COMCAST CORP
summary: Comcast is a global media and technology company providing broadband, wireless, video, and voice services under Xfinity, Comcast Business, Sky, and NOW brands. It produces and distributes entertainment, sports, and news through NBC, Telemundo, Universal, Peacock, and Sky, and owns Universal theme parks. The company operates two primary businesses: Connectivity & Platforms and Content & Experiences, serving residential, business, and enterprise customers in the United States, United Kingdom, and Italy.

products.name: Xfinity Broadband
products.description: Residential broadband over HFC and fiber-to-the-premises networks with speeds up to gigabit-plus.

products.name: Comcast Business
products.description: Broadband, wireline voice, wireless, and enterprise connectivity solutions for small to large businesses.

products.name: Xfinity Wireless
products.description: MVNO wireless services for residential customers using Verizon's network and Comcast Wi-Fi hotspots.

products.name: X1 Platform
products.description: Cloud-based video platform with voice-activated remote, integrated streaming, and on-demand content.

products.name: Sky Q
products.description: Cloud-based video platform for UK and Italy using satellite and broadband connections.

products.name: Sky Stream
products.description: Streaming device offering Sky video services over broadband without a satellite dish.

products.name: Sky Glass
products.description: Smart television offering Sky video services over broadband in UK and Italy.

products.name: Xumo Stream Box
products.description: Streaming device for domestic broadband customers providing access to internet-based apps and on-demand content.

products.name: Peacock
products.description: Direct-to-consumer streaming service producing and distributing entertainment, sports, and news content.

products.name: NOW
products.description: Prepaid broadband, wireless, and DTC streaming services offered domestically and internationally.

products.name: Internet Essentials
products.description: Low-income broadband adoption program offering discounted services at up to 75 Mbps downstream.

products.name: Internet Essentials Plus
products.description: Low-income broadband program offering discounted services at up to 100 Mbps downstream.

products.name: Universal Theme Parks
products.description: Theme parks and attractions owned and operated in the United States and Asia.

partnerships.description: MVNO agreement providing wireless network access for Comcast's domestic residential and business wireless services.
MVNO agreement to provide wireless network access for business customers beginning in 2026.
Disney+ bundled as part of Comcast video packages offered to residential customers.
Netflix included as a bundled DTC streaming service within Comcast video packages.
